title: Minimal scene (sync)
summary: Inline JSON with no external file fetch; create one cube and one floor synchronously with createJsonSceneSimple. createJsonSceneSimple() is a simplified version of createJsonScene that only guarantees synchronous loading; async textures may fail. See 00-01-minimal-mesh.html for the complete loading flow.
highlights: createJsonSceneSimple() is a simplified createJsonScene path and returns the runtime directly, with no async/await.
sceneData lives inside the page, so beginners do not need fetch.
It only guarantees synchronous loading; async textures may fail, so use 00-01-minimal-mesh.html for the complete flow.

title: Minimal scene (async)
summary: Start with a single box and declarative rotate; walk through the minimal friendly JSON pipeline with createJsonScene and the complete async loading flow.
highlights: createJsonScene() loads sceneConfig + worldInfo in one call.

title: Primitives and materials
summary: Showcase box/sphere/cylinder/cone/ring/torus/capsule, textured floor, glass, and PBR fields.
highlights: sphereModelList and modelList carry different geometry types.

title: Friendly JSON full scene
summary: sceneConfig + multiple typed lists + friendlyMap; see how friendly shapes normalize into objectList.
highlights: friendlyMap fills default objType on list items.
animations driven by the core frame loop.

title: Standard JSON full scene
summary: Standard IR: runtime and content objects share objectList—suited for procedural generation and AI output debugging.
highlights: scene/camera/renderer/controls/light alongside meshes in one list.
Compare with friendly JSON to understand the mapping.

title: Import paths (split vs import map)
summary: Clone the repo: relative core + builtins/register paths; other demos use an import map mapped to threejson / threejson/core (same as npm).
highlights: core/index.js does not include built-in domain registration.
builtins/register.js registers all built-in domains in the catalog.
See examples/html-demo/README.md for the standard import map.

title: Resource reclaim (auto default + optional manual)
summary: Zero-touch: createJsonScene + runtime.dispose(); optional disposeByThreeJsonId(scene, threeJsonId) to remove a single object by id.
highlights: Scene runs fine without calling reclaim APIs explicitly.
disposeByThreeJsonId(scene, id) removes one object by business id.
runtime.dispose() releases GPU resources and listeners on page unload.

title: Manual single-object deploy (**optional**)
summary: Advanced elective: createSceneRuntime + deployMesh for a single box JSON record; compare with the docs/README imperative path—the main track still uses createJsonScene.
highlights: View after t00-01; compare with createJsonScene to understand low-level deploy.
Single objType: box + deployMesh; no full domain entry required.
Useful when assembling scenes dynamically or debugging a single object.

title: sceneConfig.intro splash
summary: postLoad DOM intro: logo + text, fixed duration, click to skip; shown after deploy before onSceneReady.
highlights: excludeFromLoadWait: no loadingMask/onSceneReady wait; defaults blockInteraction false.
blockInteraction false: pointer pass-through; skipOnClick only on slide content.

title: Groups, lines, and panels
summary: Imperative API vs JSON: createGroup, createLine2, infoPanel, and batch visibility by objType.

title: Planes and line topology
summary: planeList ground planes and line topology: line / lineSegments / lineLoop.
highlights: plane uses rotation to lie on the ground.

title: Preset objTypes
summary: wallList / floorList / glassList with friendlyMap defaults to reduce repeated fields.
highlights: List items may omit per-item objType.

title: CSG joins and holes
summary: joins / holes declared on boxModelList items for boolean ops (three-bvh-csg).

title: Helpers and irregular geometry
summary: sceneConfig.helpers (Grid + Axes), irregularPlane / shapeExtrude / bufferMesh, and parallelTo quick orientation.
highlights: shapeExtrude and bufferMesh triangle mesh examples.

title: Native generic objects
summary: parseMode / objType native: Three.js-native objTypes not yet defined in ThreeJSON (e.g. TorusKnot, Lathe, Dodecahedron) are allowed; ObjectLoader can auto-infer and create them; includes hierarchical Group and parseMode:native dual path.
highlights: torusKnot / latheVase / dodecahedronGem are non-core objTypes; auto routes to native.
parseMode:native forces bypass of the box-specific parser.

title: JSM geometry and asset refs
summary: RoundedBoxGeometry (roundedBox alias), geometryRef/materialPreset, native Line2; perspective Orbit for browsing (orthographic/fly see json-format).
highlights: roundedBox alias and preset-ref rounded box, native Line2 polyline.

title: Orthographic camera + Fly controls
summary: OrthographicCamera + lookAt + FlyControls; verify orthographic frustum resize and fly initial orientation.
highlights: camera.type orthographic + lookAt aimed at the scene.
Under autoResize / firstAutoResize, orthographic frustum keeps world height.

title: Heatmap and wind strips
summary: heatList planar/volumetric heat and windList dynamic texture strips.
highlights: wind texture flow driven by TWEEN.
geometry.depth distinguishes planar vs volumetric heat.

title: Points and motion
summary: particleList (points) three motion modes: static, fall, rise drift.
highlights: Right panel toggles static / fall / rise.

title: Weather domain
summary: domainModelList with domain: weather rain / snow preset particles.

title: Sprite / tube / instanced
summary: spriteList markers, tubeList pipe paths, instancedList column-grid instancing.

title: Scene background and panorama
summary: scene.background equirect panorama and solar-system sphereModelList (requires createSceneRuntimeAsync).

title: Spatial audio
summary: audioList ambient and positional modes (playback requires user gesture).

title: particleEmitter gpuCompute
summary: objType particleEmitter: gpuCompute (GPUComputationRenderer) vs cpu twinkle comparison.
highlights: Falls back to cpu without WebGL2.

title: particleEmitter third-party provider
summary: extensions/particle-nebula: provider: nebula registers a third-party particle adapter, side-by-side with core.
highlights: Import threejson/core first, then extensions/particle-nebula to register provider.
JSON provider: nebula → adapter tweaks material then delegates to core.
Warn and fall back to core when extension not imported.

title: textureQuality texture sampling tiers
summary: sceneConfig / material.textureQuality 0–3 merged with path-A presets; runtime applyObjectChange hot toggle.
highlights: sceneConfig.textureQuality is the scene default tier (S).
material.textureQuality overrides scene default; 0 opts out.
Explicit generateMipmaps / minFilter / anisotropy (C) win over tier bundles.

title: Shader sky and water (folder)
summary: nature.sky / nature.water + shaderSurface: static presets and handler: cycle day/night loop.
highlights: Subfolder: static sky/water and dynamic cycle.

steps.title: Static sky and ocean
steps.summary: domainModelList (nature.sky / nature.water) + shaderSurfaceList demonstrate shader presets and domain semantic wrapping.
highlights: quality: low | medium | high | ultra controls water fidelity.

steps.title: Sky day/night cycle
steps.summary: nature.sky handler: cycle keyframe interpolation + automatic 24h loop; optional syncBackground syncs solid-color background.
highlights: syncBackground applies only to solid-color scene.background.
Static dawn/noon/night still available via handler switch.

title: glTF external models
summary: externalModelList loads in-repo glTF alongside floor box in the same scene.

title: glTF animation mixer
summary: glTF with translation clips; verify AnimationMixer and animationMode.

title: Native Three JSON domain
summary: domainModelList nativeThree loads three_native.json subgraph.

title: OBJ and maps fallback
summary: objModelList loads maps_fallback/alpaca.obj; demonstrates same-directory maps/ material fallback.

title: animationGraph state machine
summary: glTF + animationGraph: parameter-driven state transitions and clipFinished fallback; without graph, still plays all clips.
highlights: slow ↔ fast crossFade; pulse one-shot clip.
Opt-in graph only; compatible with legacy JSON.

title: Object registry
summary: refName / threeJsonId / name query runtime objects and modify transforms and materials.

title: PluginHost and physics
summary: In-page toggle between simple-gravity and physics-rapier (WASM), hooked on PluginHost.beforePhysics.

title: First-person walk (folded)
summary: Progressive depth: PointerLock walk → Player Rig → Rapier capsule collision (full version is default preview).
highlights: Rapier CharacterController full example on default page.

steps.title: Basic walk
steps.summary: controls.type firstPerson + optional extensions fps-walk ground snap.

steps.title: Player rig
steps.summary: camera.attachTo mounts camera on refName: player group; WASD moves the rig.

title: Core event mechanism (EventScript)
summary: Plain box with events.click.script and await wait; dblclick sidebar to edit and rebind.
highlights: Click box: move left → wait → move back.
Dblclick opens script sidebar; Apply rebinds immediately.
Phase-1 plain path; domain wiring is optional.

title: Per-object lifecycle (ready / dispose)
summary: object.ready runs after deploy; object.dispose runs before explicit async removal; batch load replays ready after ELM bind.
highlights: createJsonScene: host hook during deploy; JSON ready script replays after bind.
Press D for dynamic deployJsonObjectAsync; press R to trigger object.dispose through removeObjectByIdAsync.

title: Declarative actions
summary: Use action/actions for move, visibility, and patch interactions; action and script can coexist, with actions first.
highlights: Single action shorthand and multi-action arrays.
object.patch defaults to sync/deferred behavior and does not force texture awaits.
scene.ready can bind to a scene record.

title: Info panel gallery
summary: infoPanelList static-type gallery: box/sprite × text/html/img; fix:false dblclick dismiss demo.
highlights: Orange panel uses fix:false to hide on double-click (core event mechanism).

title: CSS3D interactive panel
summary: css3dPanelList interactive DOM / iframe panels (complements static infoPanel textures).
highlights: Right iframe requires target site to allow embedding.

steps.title: Curved-screen browser
steps.summary: VR floating curved screen mounts threejs.org; scroll wheel zoom; advanced beyond basic css3dPanel.

title: AI scene generation
summary: ChatGPT/DeepSeek generate and adjust scene JSON; renderSceneByJsonString unified rendering.
highlights: JSON full replace / RFC6902 patch / auto-adjust modes.
Agent multi-turn, staged auto-load, streaming preview and abort.
Camera hold and per-round adaptive framing.

title: Nested subdomains (weather.rain / weather.wind)
summary: Dot-qualified id dispatches subdomains: weather.rain / weather.wind coexist with root weather; businessDomains chained navigation.
highlights: Root weather domain still handles snow and other handlers.

title: Core network room zone A
summary: Enterprise modular datacenter ops dashboard: hot/cold aisles, UPS zones, 18 racks, heatmap/aisle airflow, first-person walk and ops menus.
highlights: worldInfo friendly lists + deployScheduler phased deploy.
Aisle airflow/heatmap/capacity and environment monitoring menus.

title: Smart port
summary: Port business dashboard; default portShow.json.

title: Scene editor
summary: General editor: load local JSON, export, adaptive layout, and AI Agent configuration.

title: Scene player
summary: Playlist, folder import, firstPerson and fps-walk auto bootstrap.

title: stat statistics domain
summary: stat subdomain progression: transparent bars → bar grid → Canvas panel → ECharts (default preview is stat.grid bar array).

steps.title: stat.bar transparent bars
steps.summary: Generic stat.bar subdomain: domainModelList declares value/max, transparent utilization bars and statLabel textures.

steps.title: stat.grid bar array
steps.summary: stat.grid multi-bar layout: spacingX/Z, columns, origin.

steps.title: stat.panel dashboard
steps.summary: stat.panel: 3D plane + Canvas multi-line KPI summary (not ECharts).
highlights: Combines with stat.bar in same scene

steps.title: stat.chart + ECharts
steps.summary: stat.chart thin subdomain + extensions/stat-echarts: CSS3D panel mounts ECharts (optional peer).

steps.title: stat.line 3D polyline
steps.summary: stat.line: Line2 polylines with optional drop lines, sphere markers, and statLabel on vertices.

steps.title: stat.pie 3D pie chart
steps.summary: stat.pie: cylinder sector slices with statLabel overlays (≤8 slices).

steps.title: stat.pie vs stat.ring
steps.summary: Same scene: solid pie (left) vs CSG ring chart (right); import map needs three-bvh-csg.
highlights: ring uses holes[] CSG inner cylinder

title: text objects (folded)
summary: objType:text three modes: default SDF (troika), Canvas texture fallback, TextGeometry extruded mesh.
highlights: sceneConfig.textFont scene-level font and Unicode fallback

steps.title: sdf vs texture comparison
steps.summary: Side-by-side troika SDF Chinese labels, Canvas texture, and English SDF.
highlights: Default sdf + unicode fallback (no full font library needed)
